query:
ALTER TABLE companies 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pendingPlanId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pendingBillingInterval ENUM('monthly','annual') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pendingPlanEffectiveAt BIGINT NULL;
